---
title: "Elizabeth Eastlake"
---

## Elizabeth Eastlake

**Dates:** (1809-1893)

**Maiden name:** (Rigby), Lady

### Description

critic

### Biography

She married the painter Charles Lock Eastlake in 1849;  he was knighted in 1850.

### Letters

- Letter from Febry 14 [1865]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
